chart.title: Mismanaged plastic waste
chart.subtitle: Mismanaged plastic waste includes materials burned in open pits, dumped into seas or open waters, or disposed of in unsanitary landfills and dumpsites.
chart.note: Regional aggregates were calculated by Our World in Data and are based on those specified by the [OECD](#dod:oecd-regions).

Mismanaged.citationShort: OECD (2023) – processed by Our World in Data
Mismanaged.citationLong: OECD (2023) – processed by Our World in Data. “Mismanaged” [dataset]. OECD, “Global Plastics Outlook - Plastics waste by region and end-of-life fate” [original data].
